# `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` — issue templates

Locked. Three templates:

- `feature.yml` — proposing a new feature (must link to the feature backlog)
- `bug.yml` — reporting a bug
- `starter-task.yml` — pre-filled starter issues the instructor can copy from
  for the class backlog

The `starter-task.yml` template is the one you'll use most as an
instructor — it lets you bulk-create the class backlog from a list of
pre-defined topics with consistent shape.
